summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 16 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-routing mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Unique PR with failing proof/checks; keep open and independent in this inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned draft feature with session/security-boundary risk needs maintainer direction before backlog automation should classify it further.
Unique Telegram fix candidate with proof still failing; no closure or merge action is supported.
Unique narrow bug fix candidate, but proof is not passing.
Independent media-parser PR; proof and review-bot resolution are insufficient for merge or closeout planning.
Independent UI fix candidate; linked issue is evidence only and current proof failure blocks stronger action.
Independent Feishu feature/fix candidate with conflicts and failing proof; keep open without mutation.
Large independent hardening PR with conflicts, failing checks, and unresolved bot-review evidence.
Independent status-output cleanup PR; no duplicate or superseding PR is hydrated and proof is failing.
Independent status guidance PR with conflicts and failing proof; security-shaped label alone does not require route_security.
The artifact shows active author-follow-up status mixed with sufficient-proof labeling and failing current proof, which needs maintainer judgment.
This may be a viable maintainer review/merge candidate, but merge is disallowed for this job and status still indicates author follow-up.
Independent config migration fix candidate; proof failure and unhydrated linked issue prevent stronger action.
Independent command-lane feature PR with failing current proof.
Independent gateway cleanup PR; current proof failure blocks merge or closeout planning.
Independent Telegram fix candidate; no hydrated duplicate/canonical and current proof is failing.

needs_human: #68289 requires maintainer direction because it is a maintainer-owned draft workspace reset feature with session/security-boundary risk and failing proof.
#68558 requires maintainer judgment because labels show proof sufficient and waiting on author while current Real behavior proof fails.
#68677 requires maintainer judgment because it appears close to reviewable with passing proof/checks, but the job forbids merge and the PR is still labeled waiting on author.
